title: Simple More Items
description: Try this mod that adds new emerald items, emerald armors, uranium and warry items and armors that are not yet in the game!
body:
**Can items be crafted?**

 - Yes, emerald items and armor can be crafted with emeralds.

**Are uranium items strong?**

 - Uranium items are very powerful and you can kill some creatures with one hit with a sword.

**What is Warry mine?**

 - Warry items and armors are mines that I created entirely in my own mind. They have no equivalent in real life.
 

_______________________________________________________________________________________

EN:

 

[EMERALD ITEMS AND ARMOR]

Features provided by the mod:


• Emerald Items (Sword, pickaxe, axe etc.)
• Emerald Armor
• Uranium Ore
• Warry Armor
• Uranium Items
• Uranium Armor

TR:


[ZÜMRÜT EŞYALAR VE ZIRH]

Modun sağladığı özellikler:

 

• Zümrüt Eşyalar (Kılıç, kazma, balta vb.)
• Zümrüt Zırh
• Uranyum Cevheri
• Savaş Zırhı
• Uranyum Eşyalar
• Uranyum Zırh
